title.en: Classifiers and Regressors for Computer Graphics
title.zh: 電腦圖學的分類器與回歸模型
title.ja: コンピュータグラフィックスの分類器と回帰モデル
title.ko: 컴퓨터 그래픽스를 위한 분류기와 회귀 모델

description: Explored how simple machine learning models can solve graphics-oriented problems by building a K-means image segmentation pipeline and training models to predict optimal Tic-Tac-Toe moves. The project focused on feature engineering, cross-validation, and comparing model behavior across classification and regression tasks.

title.en: Convolutional Neural Networks for Computer Graphics Image Colorization
title.zh: 用於電腦圖學影像上色的卷積神經網路
title.ja: コンピュータグラフィックス画像彩色のための畳み込みニューラルネットワーク
title.ko: 컴퓨터 그래픽스 이미지 컬러라이제이션을 위한 합성곱 신경망

description: Built a PyTorch image colorization pipeline that learns to reconstruct LAB color channels from grayscale inputs. The project moved from a compact CNN regressor baseline to a deeper encoder-decoder colorizer, then extended the model with GPU training and transfer learning on a second dataset to study generalization beyond the original face images.

title.en: Hybrid Transformer U-Net for Cell Segmentation
title.zh: 用於細胞分割的混合式 Transformer U-Net
title.ja: 細胞セグメンテーションのためのハイブリッド Transformer U-Net
title.ko: 세포 분할을 위한 하이브리드 Transformer U-Net

description: Developed and tested deep learning models that can separate individual cells in microscopy images, helping make biological image analysis faster and more consistent. The project showed that a hybrid U-Net + Transformer approach performed best, improving accuracy without needing a much larger model.

Developed and launched a modern website for a Tokyo eyebrow salon brand using HTML, CSS, PHP, and WordPress. Focused on responsive front-end design, reusable components, and performance improvements that helped grow reach and engagement.

title.ja: SkyOre インディープラットフォーマー

description: Created a 2D indie platformer in Unity using C# and ShaderLab, featuring procedural map generation, physics-based gameplay, and optimized animation systems. Designed the game to feel smooth, responsive, and scalable across devices.

title.zh: LHS 課程規劃 iOS App
title.ja: LHS 授業計画 iOS アプリ

description: Built an iOS course planning app in Swift that helps students map out four-year graduation plans. Used MVVM architecture and CoreData for a scalable, polished experience with persistent scheduling and an intuitive interface.
A tools-oriented placeholder for scripting, automation, and the kind of utility project that starts small and becomes part of the workflow.

A full-stack personal finance web app built for DivHacks 2025 that helps users track spending, visualize financial trends, and better understand their habits. By combining Capital One API data with OpenAI-powered summaries, Budgeteer turns real transaction data into clear, interactive, and accessible financial insights.

title.ja: ポートフォリオウェブサイト

description: A multilingual personal portfolio website designed and built from scratch to showcase my programming, creative, and academic work. I focused on creating a polished, human-centered interface with custom neumorphic styling, dynamic project rendering from JSON, language switching, and interactive gallery/search experiences that make the site feel both personal and functional.
